# command-json: ["/usr/bin/fping", "-C", "5", "-p", "200", "-q", "-S", "10.10.110.223", "192.0.2.1"]
# command: /usr/bin/fping -C 5 -p 200 -q -S 10.10.110.223 192.0.2.1
# returncode: 1
# --- stdout ---

# --- stderr ---
